steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The student links two ideas with “though...also”: smaller areas were “less affected” (lower values than large cities) yet congestion “worsened in them over time” (upward trend). Finding the correct answer means identifying data that shows both.

steps.title: Match the signal to the data
steps.content: Choice C delivers both conditions: Albany remained consistently below NYC across 1990–2000 (less affected), and both areas experienced rising delay during this period (worsened). The other three either lack the area-to-area comparison, contradict the graph, or reverse the relative values. That matches choice C — C is correct.
